title: Nutty Crispy Russian Macaroni Stir-fry
description: A vibrant and energizing vegetarian-friendly dish featuring crispy macaroni with a nutty blend of vegetables and spices.
instructions: Chop the carrots, celery stalks, and onions into small pieces.
Peel and finely chop the garlic cloves.
Rinse the macaroni under cold water and set aside.
In a large skillet or wok, heat the sunflower oil over medium-high heat.
Add chopped vegetables (carrots, celery, onions) to the skillet. Sauté until they start to brown slightly.
Stir in minced garlic and chili flakes. Cook for another minute.
Pour in the vegetable broth and bring it to a boil. Reduce heat to low, add macaroni, pumpkin seeds, pine nuts, salt, and black pepper. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
Simmer gently until the macaroni is fully cooked and absorbs most of the liquid from the broth. Adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve hot garnished with fresh chopped parsley if desired.
